product:aeroforce-router-pro:text:1d63f2.text:
Product ID: aeroforce-router-pro
Product: AeroForce Router Pro
Category: Networking
Document: AeroForce Wi-Fi 7 FAQ

AeroForce Wi-Fi 7 Router supports the new multi-link operation (MLO) protocol. If MLO fails to associate, toggle the MLO compatibility mode switch in the wireless admin panel under Advanced > Wireless 7 Settings. The status indicator on the top panel will turn violet when Wi-Fi 7 MLO is active.
